title: psilanthus horsfieldianus
intro: Psilanthus horsfieldianus, also known as Horsfield's psilanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Psilanthus horsfieldianus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
